steps.title: Use the continuity clue
steps.content: The decisive clue is "continuously worked." Begay's public-health effort involved traveling throughout the vast Navajo homeland and writing a medical dictionary, so the blank must describe effort sustained over time.

steps.title: Reject unrelated qualities
steps.content: Choice A means unbiased, which does not describe the duration of the work. Choice B means casual or unplanned, and choice D means required by rule. The remaining word means continuing steadily despite time or effort, matching "continuously worked." The answer is C.
